title: Project Admin Officer
description:
Administrative Support

  • Provide full administrative support including document preparation, filing, records management, and data entry.

  • Coordinate meetings, prepare agendas, take minutes, and track follow-up actions.

  • Manage departmental correspondence, emails, and phone enquiries professionally.

  • Support procurement processes including quotations, purchase requests, and invoice tracking in accordance with public sector guidelines.

  • Maintain and update internal systems, databases, and trackers accurately.

Personal Assistant Support

  • Manage calendars, appointments, and scheduling for senior management.

  • Coordinate internal and external meetings, including logistics, meeting materials, and visitor arrangements.

  • Assist in travel arrangements and claims (where applicable), ensuring compliance with organisational policies.

  • Act as a key point of contact between senior management and internal/external stakeholders.

Coordination & Secretariat Duties

  • Liaise with internal departments, public agencies, and external vendors to support administrative matters.

  • Assist in the preparation of reports, presentations, and briefing materials.

  • Support organisation of events, workshops, and official engagements.

Requirements

Qualifications & Experience

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification in Business Administration, Public Administration, or related fields.

  • At least 2–3 years of relevant administrative or PA experience, preferably in the public sector.

    Interested candidates may apply via email to spct@scientecpersonnel.com. All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

    Coen Tay Zhi Xuan (R1989334)

    ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd (ScienTec Personnel) -11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd

1 Harbourfront Place, #16-04, Harbourfront Tower One, Singapore 098633

Tel: +65 6225 3272
